case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSE ANGEL IBARRA GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $548.28 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT IBARRA GONZALEZ, JOSE ANGEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE ANGELE IBARRA GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
